title: Bloating: The Diet Advice Making It Worse
description: Chronic bloating is often treated as background noise, but its causes are more specific and preventable than mainstream gastroenterology acknowledges. This article investigates three underappreciated drivers — food additives, flawed elimination protocols, and diaphragmatic dysfunction — that standard treatment doesn't address. Following the guidelines correctly may be exactly why millions of people aren't getting better.
